channel.title: summarizedStoriesMainNLpolitics
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from summarizedStoriesMainNLpolitics, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Mike Johnson faces tough June as deadlines approach
item.description: House Speaker Mike Johnson (R-La.) is bracing for a series of challenging deadlines and uncomfortable votes when the House returns from recess next week.

item.title: Federal judge temporarily blocks Trump's $1.77B anti-weaponization fund
item.description: A federal judge issued a temporary block on the Trump administration's $1.776 billion anti-weaponization fund in a Friday order.

item.title: Performers continue to withdraw from Trump-linked Freedom 250 concert series
item.description: Two-thirds of the announced Freedom 250 lineup have dropped out, with most artists citing concerns about association with the event.

item.title: Judge orders Trump's name removed from Kennedy Center
item.description: A D.C. district judge signed an order Friday requiring President Trump's name to be removed from the Kennedy Center.
